strategy.name: Antigravity — 5M Scalping
strategy.description: EMA 9/21 crossover confirmed by VWAP session bias + Stoch RSI pullback timing. Designed for 5-minute bars. Fast entries, tight stops, 1:2 R:R.

indicators.ema_9: Fast EMA — immediate momentum direction. Cross above EMA21 = bullish.
indicators.ema_21: Slow EMA — confirmation trend. Cross below EMA9 = bearish.
indicators.ema_200: Macro structure. Long only above, short only below.
indicators.vwap: Session bias. Above = buyers in control. Below = sellers.
indicators.stoch_rsi: Entry timing. K < 20 = oversold snap-back. K > 80 = overbought reversal.
indicators.rsi_14: Confirmation. Not overbought for long (< 65). Not oversold for short (> 40).
indicators.atr_14: Stop and target sizing. SL = 1× ATR, TP = 2× ATR.

long: EMA 9 crosses above EMA 21 (momentum shift up)
Price above VWAP (session buyers in control)
short: EMA 9 crosses below EMA 21 (momentum shift down)
Price below VWAP (session sellers in control)

exit_rules: Take profit: 2× ATR(14) from entry (1:2 R:R)
No maximum hold — exits are purely SL/TP based
risk_rules: Never risk more than 1% of scalp portfolio per trade
Maximum trade size capped by SCALP_MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by SCALP_MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
No trades in the first and last 15 minutes of a session (high spread)
Skip signal if spread > 0.1% of price
Paper trade first — 5M scalping requires tight execution
